notes: Governed-lane runtime-config for fused_gemv_dequant (Q4K dequant + partial GEMV, host-side reduce variant). Each PE dequants its weight slice and computes partials; the host reads per-PE partials and sums. Bypasses the hand-rolled fabric allreduce whose async-send teardown stalls — see bench/out/dual-compile-evidence/fused-gemv-dequant/runtime-run/result.json iter-35/36 notes for the deferred fabric fix.
